CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "HCS - SYSTEMS HIGH CONTENT SCREENING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "HCS - SYSTEMS HIGH CONTENT SCREENING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "HCS - SYSTEMS HIGH CONTENT SCREENING"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "High Content Screening - HCS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "HCS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "32-HCS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-HCS
